snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub

Nastavak prińće o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" prińća o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaŇ°a ńćiji postupci se i dan danas preprińćavaju. Na ńćelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih Ňĺestokih momaka sa naŇ°ih prostora, zańćetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir MagaŇ°, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. Pravińćan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reŇ°avao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anńĎeo ńćuvar dok je za ove druge bio nońána mora, a gnev i jańćinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odlińćno pamtili. ŇĹivotni put Ljubomira MagaŇ°a i druŇĺine koju je okupio oko sebe, moŇĺe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriŇĺnih deńćaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovńćega. Saznańáemo na koje sve skrivene i javne nańćine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogańĎaja iz njegovog Ňĺivota. ńĆuńáemo i svedońćanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristińćkih akcionih filmova.


Posetite naŇ° sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

#dosije #masanlekic #PRVA

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.title: Zdravo Mamińá za N1 o bratu Zoranu, Grabar-Kitarovińá i hrvatskom pravosuńĎu
snippet.description:
Fudbalska reprezentacija Bosne i Hercegovine veńćeras ńáe na Olimpijskom stadionu u Helsinkiju odmjeriti snage s reprezentacijom Finske u prvom kolu kvalifikcija za Svjetsko prvenstvo koje ńáe se 2022. godine igrati u Kataru.

Uońći utakmice Zdravko Mamińá govorio je za N1 o novoizabranom selektoru Petevu.

snippet.title: Daniel Cormier reacts to Francis Ngannou's KO of Stipe Miocic at UFC 260 | SportsCenter
snippet.description:
Former UFC heavyweight champion Daniel Cormier joins SportsCenter to discuss Francis Ngannou's title-winning knockout of Stipe Miocic at UFC 260. DC talks about how good Ngannou looked and what a potential matchup with Jon Jones would look like later in 2021.

snippet.title: A1 Nogometni Podcast #61 - Drago ńÜosińá
snippet.description:
Svako novo podrhtavanje tla traumatińćno je iskustvo, a i jaka vibracija mobitela moŇĺe biti vrlo neugodna. Zato je tu Smirilica, umirujuńáa melodija zvona nastala ublaŇĺavanjem vibracija potresa. Njenim preuzimanjem doniraŇ° za potresom pogońĎena podruńćja i zato ugasi vibru i upali Smirilicu, a viŇ°e detalja pronańĎi ovdje: https://www.cinipravustvar.hr/smirilica‚Äč‚Äč

P.S. nakon ove melodije neńáe ti teŇ°ko pasti ni kad ti frend javi da Bayern doma gubi od Arminije!
-------------
Gost A1 Nogometnog Podcasta je Drago ńÜosińá, naŇ° slavni komentator koji se proslavio komentirajuńái utakmice hrvatske reprezentacije. Razgovarat ńáemo o svemu: radu na HRTu, HRSu i dakako, o reprezentaciji.

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgia‚Äč‚Äč

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-‚Äč‚Äč...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list‚Äč‚Äč...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list‚Äč‚Äč...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagram‚Äč‚Äč
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebook‚Äč‚Äč
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficial‚Äč‚Äč
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitter‚Äč‚Äč
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtube‚Äč‚Äč

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa‚Äč #FutureNostalgia‚Äč #Grammys

snippet.title: Stuck at sea: Cargo ship wedged in Suez Canal causes traffic jam
snippet.description:
Tug boats and a digger are struggling to free a mega cargo ship, blocking one of the world's busiest shipping pathways.

Dozens of ships are stuck because a container ship almost half a kilometre long is wedged across the waterway.

snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

snippet.title: Nemamo ni struju ni vodu!
snippet.description:
Svi koji Ňĺele pomońái brańái Sarajlińá donacije  mogu uplatiti putem Western uniona na adresu: Mirsada Sarajlińá, selo Vrhovine, 72250 Vitez, BiH, mobitel:062 726 649 ili na rańćun u KM na HVB Central Profit Banka na ime Mirsada Sarajlińá rańćun broj: 1290000000000006 Broj komitenta: 40128321000
Brańáa Sarajlińá, Aldin i Sedin nemaju ni struju ni vodu. Kuńáu im je napravila Hayat televizija, odnosno donatori emisije "Ispuni mi Ňĺelju". Ovi maloljetnici dobri su uńćenici a odnedavno su i uknjiŇĺeni na posjed gdje se nalazi kuńáa tako da mogu traŇĺiti dozvolu za elektrińćni prikljuńćak. NajviŇ°e im pomaŇĺe nana Mirsada, inańće penzionerka koja ńćak odlazi u Ň°umu skupljati drva kako bi preŇĺivjeli. Aldin i Sedin nemaju mobitel niti kompjutor. Aldin ide na dnevnicu kada ima posla a kada nema, hrani dvije koze koje su dobile i jarińáe. Ovim djeńćacima kaŇĺu preńće je kupatilo i voda nego struja. ViŇ°e pogledajte u video prińći koju smo danas snimili u Vrhovinama kod Viteza.
PridruŇĺite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

snippet.title: Dollar Store Makeover
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am trying a bit of a new concept for my channel. I decided to go shopping at the Dollar Store for a couple of items that I thought would be fun to paint on, customize and decorate to make them more of my style. I noticed shopping at the Dollar Tree, that there were so many cute things that had a lot of easy DIY potential. I wanted to do this to show that you don't need to spend a lot to have fun with art and customizing things. There are so many cheap and affordable items to be painted on! This video starts out with a mini dollar tree haul, and then I go on to feature 3 different $1 makeovers. I hope I give you some fun ideas for easy dollar store flips!

Let me know if you want me to try this again or if you want me to try the "EXTREME MODE" (lol) dollar store makeover where I choose my art supplies from the dollar store as well.


PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ūüėā ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV

localized.title: Dollar Store Makeover
localized.description:
Hey guys! Today I am trying a bit of a new concept for my channel. I decided to go shopping at the Dollar Store for a couple of items that I thought would be fun to paint on, customize and decorate to make them more of my style. I noticed shopping at the Dollar Tree, that there were so many cute things that had a lot of easy DIY potential. I wanted to do this to show that you don't need to spend a lot to have fun with art and customizing things. There are so many cheap and affordable items to be painted on! This video starts out with a mini dollar tree haul, and then I go on to feature 3 different $1 makeovers. I hope I give you some fun ideas for easy dollar store flips!

Let me know if you want me to try this again or if you want me to try the "EXTREME MODE" (lol) dollar store makeover where I choose my art supplies from the dollar store as well.


PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ūüėā ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

snippet.title: losing control : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
‚ÄúI crossed a line I‚Äôd never crossed in addiction.‚ÄĚ 

In part I of this fearless documentary series, Demi Lovato and her family and friends candidly open up for the first time about what led to her near-fatal overdose.

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
If you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741

snippet.title: Doctor Reacts To Awkward Medical Memes Ep. 16
snippet.description:
The medical memes just keep getting weirder! Today we talk about tonsil stones, Harry Potter, nasal tests, first year med students, gal bladder/gal stones, skeletons, the sun, pizza, cutting carbs, and someone out there made me into a Pokemon card. What a world. Got some medical memes you want me to see? Then them over and I may react to them in my next video!

I LOVE reading your comments and take your suggestions seriously. If there‚Äôs a subject you want me to discuss or something you‚Äôd like for me to react to, leave a comment down below. Many of my videos have been born out of suggestions directly from you, so don‚Äôt hold back!
-Doctor Mike Varshavski

Help us continue the fight against medical misinformation and change the world through charity by becoming a Doctor Mike Resident on Patreon where every month I donate 100% of the proceeds to the charity, organization, or cause of your choice! Residents get access to bonus content, an exclusive discord community, and many other perks for just $10 a month. Become a Resident today:

Dr Mike Patreon:
https://www.patreon.com/doctormike

Please SUBSCRIBE for new videos every Wednesday afternoon and Sunday morning!  https://goo.gl/87kYq6

snippet.title: 5 minutes from death : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
‚ÄúI knew that what I‚Äôd been looking for, I hadn‚Äôt found yet. But what I had been looking for was not in the form of a drug.‚ÄĚ
Demi and her closest confidants give a firsthand account of the aftermath of the overdose as she wakes up in the hospital after being minutes away from death.

Episode 3 available March 30 @ 12p PT

Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Pre-order Demi Lovato‚Äôs new album ‚ÄėDancing With The Devil‚Ä¶ The Art Of Starting Over‚Äô https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

snippet.title: Pravińáete ih stalno! MiriŇ°u do komŇ°ija. Banana keksińái za post na vodi, tako mekani i ukusni.
snippet.description:
HIT keksińái kod mene u kuńái. Ukuńáani stalno traŇĺe da im pravim. Mogu da stoje par dana, u kutiji kao i svi drugi keksi. UŇĺivajte!
#posnireceptinavodi #posnikolaci #banane
bez ulja
bez jaja bez mleka
sa bananama
serpica recepti

Recept na blogu:
http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/banana-keksici-post-na-vodi.html

Sastojci:
- 300 gr. braŇ°na
- 2 banane
- 3 kaŇ°ike dŇĺema
- 100 gr. Ň°eńáera u prahu
- vanila
- limunova korica
- prstohvat soli
- 10 gr. praŇ°ka za pecivo

Za premaz:
- 1 kaŇ°ika dŇĺema
- 2 kaŇ°ike vode

*200 stepeni oko 20 minuta

 ENG:
Ingredients:
- 300 gr. flour
- 2 bananas
- 3 tablespoons of jam
- 100 gr. powdered sugar
- vanilla
- lemon zest
- pinch of salt
- 10 gr. baking powder

For coating:
- 1 tablespoon of jam
- 2 tablespoons of water

* 200 degrees for about 20 minutes

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
Music‚Äôs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhen√© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, s√§je, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); s√§je for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.title: Kuńáa od srca S07, porodica Velińćkovińá 02  PINK 28. 03. 12h premijerna epizoda porodice Velińćkovińá 03
snippet.description: Projekat "Kuńáa od srca" ima za cilj zbrinjavanje najugroŇĺenijih porodica na teritoriji Republike Srbije. Ministarstvo rada i socijalne politike prepoznalo je zajednińćke ciljeve i prikljuńćilo se projektu ‚ÄĚ Kuńáa od srca ‚ÄĚ u pomońái pri zadovoljavanju osnovnih potreba ugroŇĺenih porodica. Porodice koje su deo projekta ‚ÄĚ Kuńáa od srca ‚ÄĚ uz podrŇ°ku Ministarstva rada i socijalne politike imaju priliku da budu stambeno zbrinute, materijalno potpomognute, vrańáene u obrazovni sistem Ň°to rezultira resocijalizacijom svih ńćlanova porodice uz akcentovanje na najmlańĎe ńćlanove druŇ°tva. Osnovna ideja projekta ‚ÄĚ Kuńáa od srca ‚ÄĚ jeste ukljuńćivanje celokupne zajednice u pomońá porodicama koje su od strane Ministarstva proglaŇ°ene najugroŇĺenijim. Ono Ň°to izdvaja serijal ‚ÄúKuńáa od srca‚ÄĚ, jeste ńćinjenica da je to prvi domańái rijaliti, koji se pored reŇ°avanja stambenog pitanja kroz grańĎevinske radove, bavi i reŇ°avanjem porodińćnih i meńĎuljudskih odnosa. Pravila serijala su jasno definisana i glase: 1. Izgradnja kuńáe po projektu traje 31dan i ukoliko nije gotova serijal tu zavrŇ°ava, objekat ostaje u zateńćenom stanju, sa porukom da se zajedniica ukljuńći I pomogne u zavrŇ°etku radova. 2. Da imaju imovinu najbliŇĺih koji su spremni da je ustupe za izgradnju Kuńáe od srca . 3. NajbliŇĺi ńćlanovi porodice, prijatelji I komŇ°ije moraju imati pozitivno miŇ°ljenje o izabranoj porodici. 4. Punoletni ńćlanovi izabrane porodice moraju biti druŇ°tveno odgovorni : da nisu uŇĺivaoci alkohala, droge kao I da nisu skloni nasilju, a imaju izraŇĺenu crtu o brizi za decu. Ukoliko bilo koji ńćlan porodice koji je uńćesnik serijala prekrŇ°i bilo koje pravilo, serijal se prekida istog trenutka kao I sama gradnja.

Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy

snippet.title: The Rise of Faceless Creators
snippet.description:
YouTube's top performers in the past couple of years have had a very intriguing common feature - they are faceless. Whether it's Dream, Corpse Husband, the VTuber community, and many more - it seems like keeping the mystery and protecting their privacy has been a priority. In this video we take a look at this relatively new trend that seems to be gaining popularity. 

------------------------------
SOURCES:

Teen trust youtubers more than their own family:
https://mediakix.com/blog/percent-children-becoming-a-youtuber/

1956 study on parasocial relationships:
http://visual-memory.co.uk/daniel/Documents/short/horton_and_wohl_1956.html

Stalker goes to youtuber‚Äôs home:
https://www.bbc.com/news/uk-england-merseyside-46986529

The Verge: ‚ÄúYouTubers are not your friends‚ÄĚ
https://www.theverge.com/2018/9/17/17832948/youtube-youtubers-influencer-creator-fans-subscribers-friends-celebrities



------------------------------
CREDITS:

Andrei Terbea - Lead Animator

Stefan Popa - Assistant Animator
https://www.instagram.com/jtefe.ro/

Nicoleta Toader - Producer

------------------------------
MUSIC:

Background track:  "Delusional (Instrumental)" by Spring Gang
Outro song: Joakim Karud - "Loudness & Clarity"
http://youtube.com/joakimkarud


------------------------------
#Faceless #CorpseHusband #VTuber

snippet.title: Squishy Makeovers:  Easter Edition
snippet.description:
Welcome to another episode of squishy makeovers, where I transform ugly, used, old, dirty, cheap or unwanted squishies (donated by my subscribers) into my own creations. I repair, paint and cut away for hours on end to complete these. Hopefully you like them. Get used to lots of rainbow and sprinkles, because I am addicted to both!

PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

_________FAQs__________

1. CAN I SEND YOU SQUISHIES?
So many generous people have sent me their unwanted squishies so I actually have a lot to work on already, BUT if you desperately want to, you can request my mailing address in the email ALLLL the way at down in the description (sorry for the traveling), make sure to read the disclaimer down there as well.

2. ARE SQUISHIES RETURNED TO THE SENDERS AFTER THE MAKEOVER?
No. These squishies  are sent as donations to the series because they were damaged, and no longer wanted. Everyone has been informed in advance that squishies would not be returned. It would be waaay too complicated/expensive and massively time consuming to keep track of everyone and return each squishy. I'm just one person! 

3. WHAT PAINT DO YOU USE?
I use fabric paint. Fabric paint is meant to stretch, so it is perfect for squishing! Any brand will work fine, but I mainly use Tulip. You can find it at Michaels, Hobby Lobby, A.C. Moore, Walmart, Joann Fabrics, and Online.

5. WILL FABRIC PAINT CRACK?
The matte fabric paint is more likely to crack after lots of squishing. Slick fabric paints never crack. But there are benefits to both. I usually mix the two paints together to get the best of both worlds.

6. CAN I USE ACRYLIC PAINT ON SQUISHIES?
I would not recommend that. Acrylic paint will either make the squishy hard, or it will crack and flake off very easily. 



___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ūüėā ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)

localized.title: Squishy Makeovers:  Easter Edition
localized.description:
Welcome to another episode of squishy makeovers, where I transform ugly, used, old, dirty, cheap or unwanted squishies (donated by my subscribers) into my own creations. I repair, paint and cut away for hours on end to complete these. Hopefully you like them. Get used to lots of rainbow and sprinkles, because I am addicted to both!

PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

_________FAQs__________

1. CAN I SEND YOU SQUISHIES?
So many generous people have sent me their unwanted squishies so I actually have a lot to work on already, BUT if you desperately want to, you can request my mailing address in the email ALLLL the way at down in the description (sorry for the traveling), make sure to read the disclaimer down there as well.

2. ARE SQUISHIES RETURNED TO THE SENDERS AFTER THE MAKEOVER?
No. These squishies  are sent as donations to the series because they were damaged, and no longer wanted. Everyone has been informed in advance that squishies would not be returned. It would be waaay too complicated/expensive and massively time consuming to keep track of everyone and return each squishy. I'm just one person!

snippet.title: Haaland, Mbappe and Messi TAPPED-UP on International duty!
snippet.description:
The OneFootball x 442oons show returns with Footballers tapped-up on Interntional duty! As the players meet up with their national teams, Raphael Varane and Antoine Griezmann try to convince Kylian Mbappe to join Real Madrid or Barcelona, England's Manchester United representatives try to get Jadon Sancho to sign,  Angel Di Maria has PSG contracts for Lionel Messi AND Sergio Aguero, Ole attempts to bring Erling Haaland to Old Trafford plus who will sign Zlatan?!

Check back Monday to Friday for the OneFootball Daily News, plus all the other Premier League, Bundesliga, La Liga, Serie A and European and world football content we have going up on the channel regularly!

en.description:
Visit https://omaze.com/HACKSMITH to enter for your chance to win a CUSTOM TESLA MODEL S! Use code HACKSMITH150 to get 150 additional entries!

Watch the Mandalorian on Disney+ ‚Ėļ https://www.disneyplus.com/sign-up
Watch the whole Hacklorian Series Playlist ‚Ėļ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FX8192MVmd8&list=PLbncXbXlaNQcxSSb0THFDaDy_C_ojvYig

In our HACKLORIAN series, we'll be making all of Mando's gadgets, armor, and weapons! Make sure to become a YouTube member to see the videos before anyone else! Next up... Grogu's Floating Cradle!!! And then... THE JETPACK!

GET MERCH ‚Ėļ https://www.Hacksmith.store

Become a Hacksmith member get exclusive perks! ‚Ėļ https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCjgpFI5dU-D1-kh9H1muoxQ/join
‚ĖļEarly video access 
‚ĖļProject design files (solidworks)
‚ĖļMerch Discounts 
‚ĖļCollaborate with us on our videos 

SOCIAL
Website ‚Ėļ http://www.hacksmith.tech
Facebook ‚Ėļ http://www.facebook.com/thehacksmith
Instagram ‚Ėļ http://www.instagram.com/thehacksmith
Twitter ‚Ėļ http://twitter.com/thehacksmith
Patreon ‚Ėļ http://www.patreon.com/thehacksmith
Discord ‚Ėļ https://discordapp.com/invite/thehacksmith 
Merch ‚Ėļ https://www.hacksmith.store

CHAPTERS: 
0:00 Intro
2:03 Helmet Design
4:01 Build Begins
7:39 Welding Time!

12:39 Final Touches
13:53 This Is The Way
14:30 Outro

Big thank you to Samuel Kim Music for the epic music!
https://www.youtube.com/c/samuelkimmusic

CNC Mill - Tormach PCNC 440 ‚Ėļ https://hubs.ly/H0B8DYk0

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI

Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: Sta Bi Se Desilo Kad Bi Svi Prdnuli U isto Vreme ?
snippet.description:
Ko ne lajkuje video nije dobar covek ūüėĀ

Svi smo nekad u zivotu prdnuli, nekad pustimo one stidljive gasove koje niko ne primeti, nekad one sto smrde, nekad one glasne, a nekad uz neke od njih ide i iznenadjenje. Ali sta bi se desilo kad bi u isto vreme, svi ljudi na planeti, bez imalo stida, prdnuli. Da li bi to uticalo na kvalitet vazduha ? Koliko bi se osecalo ? I sta bi jedna sibica mogla da uradi, hajmo da saznamo.

Podrzite nas na Patreonu: https://bit.ly/2DY7fn3
Mail za Saradnju/Business email: BojanZlatarevic@gmail.com

snippet.title: OLYMPIQUE LYONNAIS - PARIS SAINT-GERMAIN (2 - 4) - Highlights - (OL - PSG) / 2020-2021
snippet.description:
OLYMPIQUE LYONNAIS vs PARIS SAINT-GERMAIN Highlights (2 - 4) in video. 

Ligue 1 Uber Eats - Season 2020/2021 - Week 30 GROUPAMA STADIUM - Sunday 21 March 2021

Goals : Kylian MBAPPE (15' - PARIS SAINT-GERMAIN) / Danilo Luis Helio PEREIRA (32' - PARIS SAINT-GERMAIN) / Angel DI MARIA (47' - PARIS SAINT-GERMAIN) / Kylian MBAPPE (52' - PARIS SAINT-GERMAIN) / Islam SLIMANI (62' - OLYMPIQUE LYONNAIS) / Maxwel CORNET (81' - OLYMPIQUE LYONNAIS) 

OLYMPIQUE LYONNAIS Team line-up : 1 - Anthony LOPES /27 - Maxwel CORNET /25 - Maxence CAQUERET /7 - Karl TOKO EKAMBI /10 - Memphis DEPAY (c) /23 - Thiago MENDES /6 -  MARCELO /11 - Tino KADEWERE /5 - Jason DENAYER /12 - Lucas TOLENTINO COELHO DE LIMA /22 - Mattia DE SCIGLIO 

PARIS SAINT-GERMAIN Team line-up : 27 - Idrissa GUEYE /22 - Abdou DIALLO /3 - Presnel KIMPEMBE /6 - Marco VERRATTI /7 - Kylian MBAPPE /5 -  MARQUINHOS (c) /11 - Angel DI MARIA /1 - Keylor NAVAS /24 - Alessandro FLORENZI /18 - Bioty Moise KEAN /15 - Danilo Luis Helio PEREIRA

snippet.title: DINAMO vs GORICA 1:0 (26.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
Dinamo nije napravio krivi korak ni u 26. kolu HT Prve lige. U zahtjevnom domańáem ogledu Dinamo je s 1:0 svladao Goricu.

Veńá u prvoj minuti Dinamo je bio sasvim blizu pogotka, ali je Banińá zaustavio Petkovińáev udarac, dok je u nastavku akcije Majer pogodio okvir vrata.

Gorica se relativno brzo posloŇĺila na travnjaku i solidno parirala, iako je i dalje Dinamo bio taj koji je opasnije napadao. Prilike su propuŇ°tali Majer, Petkovińá i OrŇ°ińá, dok je na drugoj strani najopasniji bio Matar Dieye.

Prvo poluvrijeme je zavrŇ°ilo bez golova, no veńá u 47. minuti se zatresla gostujuńáa mreŇĺa. Strijelac je bio Bruno Petkovińá Ň°to je na kraju bio kljuńćni trenutak derbija.

Vrlo brzo nakon toga se teŇ°ko ozlijedio igrańć Gorice Suk, a Dinamo je relativno mirno odrŇĺavao minimalnu prednost. No, mogao je u sudańćkoj nadoknadi Matar Ň°okirati Dinamo, ali je njegov udarac zavrŇ°io na okviru vrata.

Dinamo se vratio na vrh ljestvice (dva boda viŇ°e od Osijeka), s time da ima i jednu odigranu utakmicu manje.

HT Prva liga, 26. kolo: Dinamo - Gorica 1:0 (Petkovińá 47.)

snippet.title: How to Buy a Budget Friendly Project Car
snippet.description:
Learn how you can buy a project car for less than the cost of a new cell phone! Project cars are great for learning how to fix a car and when you are "done" (project cars are never done), you can be proud to drive the car you fixed up!
In this series eBay Motors challenged me to buy a 24hr endurance race car for the 24hrs of Lemons race series. The car I chose had to be fast, reliable, and under $500!

eBay Motors (show them some love): https://ebayvehicle.com/app/ChrisFix

BlueDriver OBD 2 Code Scanner: https://amzn.to/2QHkn9r

The BEST Pricing on Racing Gear: https://www.stableenergies.com/
Visit Stable Energies: 175 Passaic St, Garfield, NJ 07026
